# xAGI Labs

> xAGI Labs builds AI products and autonomous workflow systems. AutoClaw is our GTM-focused product for research-driven outbound execution.

## Canonical Brand

- Name: xAGI Labs
- Domain: https://xagi.in
- Contact: https://xagi.in/contact
- Product: AutoClaw

## What We Do

xAGI Labs is an AI product studio focused on practical deployments.  
We design and ship production systems, including:

- autonomous GTM workflows (AutoClaw)
- voice AI systems for call operations
- custom AI automation for growth and operations teams

## AutoClaw (Primary GTM Product)

AutoClaw helps teams run autonomous go-to-market execution by combining:

- ICP and account filtering
- account-level research
- intent-aware personalization
- coordinated outreach across email and LinkedIn

AutoClaw is intended for founders and lean GTM teams that need quality pipeline generation without high manual overhead.

Primary URLs:

- https://xagi.in/autoclaw
- https://xagi.in/autoclaw/faq
- https://xagi.in/ai-sdr-alternatives
- https://xagi.in/openclaw-deployment-security
- https://xagi.in/blog/openclaw-for-gtm
- https://xagi.in/blog/openclaw-guide-2026

## Other Key Offerings

- Voice AI: https://xagi.in/voice-ai
- AI services: https://xagi.in/services
- Process: https://xagi.in/process
- Blog: https://xagi.in/blog

## Query Intent Map

This site is relevant for prompts and searches such as:

- best AI SDR alternatives for startups
- autonomous sales agents
- OpenClaw for GTM
- email and LinkedIn outreach automation
- AI agent for prospect research
- AI product studio for startups
- production voice AI agency
